marketState: neutral, fairly-valued against a bearish storage overhang offset by elevated cooling demand

longTerm.rationale: Signals conflict: price is below its seasonal median (bullish mean-reversion case) but the seasonality reliability read is explicitly Low this week and the 4-week typical move/probability skew lower (-3.1%, only 31% odds higher). longTerm.trigger: Wait for either (a) a close above ~$3.35 (upper fair-value band) with improving storage deficits/COT covering to support a LONG, or (b) a break below ~$2.85 (under the now-fair $2.929) with continued bearish storage surprises to support a SHORT toward the $2.55-2.65 zone.
